debug_info.goal:
m n : ℕ
⊢ m.factorial * n.factorial * (m + n).factorial ∣ (2 * m).factorial * (2 * n).factorial

failed_attempts: exact Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_mul_factorial m n

have h1 : m ! * m ! ∣ (2 * m)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial (by omega : m ≤ 2 * m)
  have h2 : n ! * n ! ∣ (2 * n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial (by omega : n ≤ 2 * n)
  have h3 : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial (Nat.le_add_right m n)
  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h1
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := h2
  obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := h3
  rw [ha, hb]
  use a * b * c
  rw [hc]
  ring

have h1 : m ! * m ! ∣ (2 * m)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m m
  have h2 : n ! * n ! ∣ (2 * n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
  have h3 : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m n
  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h1
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := h2
  obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := h3
  use a * b * c
  calc (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! = (m ! * m ! * a) * (n ! * n ! * b) := by rw [ha, hb]; ring
    _ = m ! * n ! * (m ! * n ! * a * b) := by ring
    _ = m ! * n ! * (c * m ! * n ! * a * b) := by rw [← hc]; ring
    _ = m ! * n ! * (m + n)! * (a * b * c) := by rw [hc]; ring

have h1 : (m + n).choose m * m ! * n ! = (m + n)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_add_right m n)
  have h2 : (2 * m).choose m * m ! * m ! = (2 * m)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left m two_pos)
  have h3 : (2 * n).choose n * n ! * n ! = (2 * n)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left n two_pos)
  have key : (m + n).choose m ∣ (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n := Nat.choose_add_dvd_choose_mul_choose m n
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := key
  calc m ! * n ! * (m + n)! = m ! * n ! * ((m + n).choose m * m ! * n !) := by rw [h1]
    _ = (m + n).choose m * (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) := by ring
    _ ∣ (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n * (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) := by exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_right (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_right key _) _
    _ = ((2 * m).choose m * m ! * m !) * ((2 * n).choose n * n ! * n !) := by ring
    _ = (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! := by rw [h2, h3]

have h1 : m ! * n ! * (m + n)! ∣ (m + n)! * m ! * ((m + n)! * n !) := by
    ring_nf
    exact dvd_refl _
  have key : (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n * (m + n).choose m = 
             (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! / (m ! * n ! * (m + n)!) := by
    rw [Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial (by omega : m ≤ 2 * m)]
    rw [Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial (by omega : n ≤ 2 * n)]
    rw [Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial (by omega : m ≤ m + n)]
    simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, Nat.two_mul, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
    have hm : m ! * m ! ∣ (m + m)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m m
    have hn : n ! * n ! ∣ (n + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
    have hmn : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m n
    rw [Nat.div_mul_div_comm hm hn, Nat.div_mul_div_comm _ hmn]
    ring_nf
    rw [mul_comm n ! m !, mul_assoc, mul_assoc]
    congr 1
    ring
  have hdvd : m ! * n ! * (m + n)! ∣ (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! := by
    have hm : m ! * m ! ∣ (2 * m)! := by simpa using Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m m
    have hn : n ! * n ! ∣ (2 * n)! := by simpa using Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
    have hmn : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m n
    obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hm
    obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hn
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hmn
    have hne : m ! * n ! * (m + n)! ≠ 0 := by positivity
    rw [ha, hb]
    rw [hc]
    use a * b * c
    ring
  exact hdvd

have h := Nat.choose_mul_choose_le_choose_add m n m n
  simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel] at h
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h
  use k * Nat.factorial m * Nat.factorial n
  calc (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! 
      = (Nat.choose (2*m) m * m! * m!) * (Nat.choose (2*n) n * n! * n!) := by
          rw [Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (by omega : m ≤ 2*m),
              Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (by omega : n ≤ 2*n)]
      _ = Nat.choose (2*m) m * Nat.choose (2*n) n * m! * m! * n! * n! := by ring
      _ = k * Nat.choose (m+n) m * m! * m! * n! * n! := by rw [hk]; ring
      _ = k * m! * n! * (Nat.choose (m+n) m * m! * n!) := by ring
      _ = k * m! * n! * (m+n)! := by rw [Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (by omega : m ≤ m+n)]
      _ = m! * n! * (m+n)! * (k * m! * n!) := by ring

  have h2 : (2 * m).choose m * (m !) * (m !) = (2 * m)! := by
    have : (2 * m).choose m * m ! * m ! = (2 * m)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left m (by norm_num : 0 < 2))
    ring_nf at this ⊢; exact this
  have h3 : (2 * n).choose n * (n !) * (n !) = (2 * n)! := by
    have : (2 * n).choose n * n ! * n ! = (2 * n)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left n (by norm_num : 0 < 2))
    ring_nf at this ⊢; exact this
  rw [← h2, ← h3]
  have key : (m + n).choose m ∣ (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n := Nat.choose_add_dvd_choose_mul_choose m n
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := key
  use k * m ! * n !
  rw [← h1]
  ring_nf
  rw [hk]
  ring

have h1 : (m + n).choose m * (m ! * n !) = (m + n)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_add_right m n)
  have h2 : (2 * m).choose m * (m ! * m !) = (2 * m)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left m Nat.two_pos)
  have h3 : (2 * n).choose n * (n ! * n !) = (2 * n)! := Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left n Nat.two_pos)
  have hchoose : (m + n).choose m ∣ (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n := Nat.choose_add_dvd_choose_mul_choose m n
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hchoose
  use k
  calc (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! 
      = ((2 * m).choose m * (m ! * m !)) * ((2 * n).choose n * (n ! * n !)) := by rw [h2, h3]
    _ = (2 * m).choose m * (2 * n).choose n * (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) := by ring
    _ = (m + n).choose m * k * (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) := by rw [hk]
    _ = k * ((m + n).choose m * (m ! * n !)) * (m ! * n !) := by ring
    _ = k * (m + n)! * (m ! * n !) := by rw [h1]
    _ = m ! * n ! * (m + n)! * k := by ring

have hm : m ! * m ! ∣ (2 * m)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m m
  have hn : n ! * n ! ∣ (2 * n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
  have hmn : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m n
  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hm
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hn
  obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hmn
  simp only [two_mul] at ha hb
  use a * b * c
  calc (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! = (m + m)! * (n + n)! := by ring_nf
    _ = (m ! * m ! * a) * (n ! * n ! * b) := by rw [ha, hb]
    _ = m ! * n ! * (m ! * n ! * a * b) := by ring
    _ = m ! * n ! * (c * (m + n)! * a * b) := by rw [← hc]; ring
    _ = m ! * n ! * (m + n)! * (a * b * c) := by ring

  have h2 : (n !) ^ 2 ∣ (2 * n)! := Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
